title: CruiseFeed API (Standby)
description: This Actor runs in Apify Standby mode - it is a live REST API, not a batch job. Start it, then send GET requests to its standby URL (e.g. /cruises?region=Caribbean&limit=10). See the README for the full endpoint list. No input is required.

apiBaseUrl.title: Upstream API base URL
apiBaseUrl.description: Advanced: override the CruiseFeed API base URL (for self-hosted mirrors). Leave as default.
